subcategory: sliding tab navigation with animated cursor
use_cases: Switching between sections in web app dashboards
Navigating between pages in documentation sites
Selecting categories in e-commerce filter menus
Switching views in SaaS product interfaces
Creating animated navigation menus for media sites
ai_summary: A sliding tab navigation component featuring an animated cursor that smoothly follows hover and selection states. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and styled with Tailwind CSS supporting dark mode. The cursor automatically positions itself based on tab dimensions and maintains the selected state when the mouse leaves the container.
